nodes.name: 2026-02-19-agent-mgmt-followup-plan.md
nodes.summary: Follow-up implementation plan addressing CEO agent PATCH authorization failures, config rollback gaps, and Issue-to-Approval linkage — covering data model, API, UI, and skill update phases.

nodes.name: 2026-02-19-ceo-agent-creation-and-hiring.md
nodes.summary: Detailed product and implementation plan for CEO agent creation workflows and agent hiring mechanics, defining how the CEO can spawn, configure, and manage subordinate agents within a company.

nodes.name: 2026-02-20-issue-run-orchestration-plan.md
nodes.summary: Plan for orchestrating issue run execution — describing how the platform coordinates agent task execution against issues, including scheduling, state management, and handoff logic.

nodes.name: 2026-02-20-storage-system-implementation.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the Paperclip storage system, covering file/artifact persistence, storage backend abstraction, and integration points with agent workspaces.

nodes.name: 2026-02-21-humans-and-permissions-implementation.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive implementation plan for the humans and permissions system, detailing RBAC roles, data model schemas, API endpoints, UI flows, and phased rollout for human-agent collaboration.

nodes.name: 2026-02-21-humans-and-permissions.md
nodes.summary: Product design document for the humans and permissions feature, outlining how human users participate alongside agents, defining role hierarchies and access control semantics.

nodes.name: 2026-02-23-cursor-cloud-adapter.md
nodes.summary: Design plan for a Cursor cloud adapter enabling Paperclip agents to operate inside Cursor IDE cloud environments, covering authentication, workspace mounting, and tool invocation protocols.

nodes.name: 2026-02-23-deployment-auth-mode-consolidation.md
nodes.summary: Plan to consolidate the multiple deployment authentication modes (cloud, self-hosted, local) into a unified auth configuration model, reducing complexity and improving consistency.

nodes.name: 2026-03-10-workspace-strategy-and-git-worktrees.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive strategy document for agent workspace isolation using Git worktrees, covering workspace lifecycle, concurrency, branch management, and the product model for work products.
nodes.languageNotes: At 1335 lines, this is the most detailed single planning document in the batch, covering Git worktree isolation strategy in depth.

nodes.name: 2026-03-11-agent-chat-ui-and-issue-backed-conversations.md
nodes.summary: Product and implementation plan for the agent chat UI feature, describing how conversations are backed by issues to provide persistent, structured communication channels between humans and agents.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-agent-evals-framework.md
nodes.summary: Framework design for automated agent evaluation, covering eval harness architecture, metric collection, scenario definitions, and integration with the CI pipeline for quality regression testing.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-company-import-export-v2.md
nodes.summary: Version 2 design plan for the company import/export feature, detailing the serialization format, migration logic, and API for moving Paperclip company configurations across environments.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-features.md
nodes.summary: Broad feature roadmap document cataloguing planned Paperclip capabilities across agent management, workspace, billing, skills, and UI, serving as a high-level product backlog reference.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-paperclip-skill-tightening-plan.md
nodes.summary: Plan for tightening and improving the Paperclip skills system — refining skill invocation, reducing token usage, improving skill authoring DX, and enforcing skill quality standards.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-plugin-kitchen-sink-example.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive kitchen-sink example document for Paperclip plugins, demonstrating all available plugin extension points, tool registrations, event hooks, and configuration patterns for plugin authors.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-TOKEN-OPTIMIZATION-PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Technical plan for optimizing LLM token usage across the Paperclip platform, covering context window management, prompt compression strategies, and token budget enforcement for agent runs.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-workspace-product-model-and-work-product.md
nodes.summary: In-depth product model document defining workspace semantics, work product lifecycle (drafts, artifacts, outputs), and the conceptual relationship between agents, issues, and deliverables.
nodes.languageNotes: At 1126 lines, this is the second largest planning document, establishing the core conceptual model for workspaces and work products.

nodes.name: 2026-03-14-adapter-skill-sync-rollout.md
nodes.summary: Rollout plan for syncing adapter skills across agent instances, describing the sync protocol, conflict resolution, versioning, and phased deployment strategy for skill distribution.

nodes.name: 2026-03-14-billing-ledger-and-reporting.md
nodes.summary: Design plan for the billing ledger and reporting system, covering usage tracking, cost attribution per agent/company, ledger data model, and reporting UI for usage and cost visibility.

nodes.name: 2026-03-14-budget-policies-and-enforcement.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive plan for budget policy definition and runtime enforcement, detailing how spending limits are set per agent/company, enforced during runs, and surfaced through alerts and hard stops.

nodes.name: 2026-03-14-skills-ui-product-plan.md
nodes.summary: Product plan for the Skills UI — defining the browsing, installation, configuration, and authoring interfaces for managing Paperclip skills within the web dashboard.

nodes.name: 2026-03-17-docker-release-browser-e2e.md
nodes.summary: Plan for Docker-based release packaging and browser end-to-end test infrastructure, covering container build pipelines, browser automation harness setup, and CI integration for release validation.

nodes.name: 2026-03-17-memory-service-surface-api.md
nodes.summary: Design plan for surfacing the memory service API, describing how agent memory is stored, retrieved, and exposed through the Paperclip API for persistent context across agent runs.

nodes.name: 2026-03-17-release-automation-and-versioning.md
nodes.summary: Plan for automating the release process and versioning strategy, covering changelog generation, semantic versioning, npm publish workflows, and GitHub release automation.

nodes.name: 2026-04-06-smart-model-routing.md
nodes.summary: Design plan for smart LLM model routing — automatically selecting the most cost-effective or capable model based on task type, complexity, and budget constraints for agent runs.
